metadata.description: Spec-driven Lean 4 autoformalization for Claude Code: point at a sorry or a textbook, get kernel-verified, reviewer-ready formalizations.

plugins.name: autoform
plugins.description: Two commands: /autoform:run (sorry/axiom or textbook/paper -> spec-gated formalization workflow, subscription-billed) and /autoform:review (reviewer packet: spec sheet, kernel evidence, faithfulness scorecard). Bundles the Lean/Mathlib conventions, workflow, and evaluation-rubric skills.
